# aibox v0.17.6

Quality-of-life release: migration briefing overhaul, structured command logging,
backup directory consolidation, processkit compatibility matrix, and docs improvements.
No processkit version change — still compatible with v0.8.0.

## Migration briefing overhaul

Migration documents generated by `aibox sync` (at `context/migrations/`) are now
substantially more useful for AI agents working inside the container:

- **Datetime-stamped filenames** — `YYYYMMDD_HHMM_{from}-to-{to}.md` for sortable history
- **processkit context in header** — briefing shows the pinned processkit version alongside the aibox version change
- **Intermediate release links** — for multi-version upgrades (e.g. v0.17.3 → v0.17.6), the breaking changes section links each intermediate release on GitHub
- **Host vs. agent split in action items** — commands the owner must run outside the container are clearly separated from file-read verifications the agent can do immediately
- **Specific verification checklist** — checks by file path (`/workspace/aibox.lock`, `context/skills/skill-finder/`, etc.) instead of generic "verify files are intact"
- **processkit state section** — if processkit content migrations are pending, the agent is directed to use `skill-finder` to locate the processkit migration skill (processkit owns that workflow, not aibox)
- **KNOWN_MIGRATIONS entry** for 0.17.4→0.17.5 (GrandLily src/ restructure)

## Structured command logging

Every major aibox command (`init`, `sync`, `start`, `reset`) now appends one
NDJSON line to `.aibox/aibox.log` in the project root:

```json
{"ts":"2026-04-10T14:32:11Z","cmd":"sync","version":"0.17.6","exit_code":0,"duration_ms":4230,"msg":"sync completed"}
```

- Log file is gitignored (`.aibox/` is already in the generated `.gitignore`)
- Rotates at 1 MB — keeps one `.1` backup, bounds disk use
- Errors in logging never crash the CLI

## Backup directory: `.aibox-backup/` → `.aibox/backup/`

`aibox reset` now writes backups to `.aibox/backup/aibox-{version}-backup-{date}-{time}/`
instead of `.aibox-backup/`. The `.aibox/` directory is already gitignored, so no
`.gitignore` change is needed in consuming projects. The separate `.aibox-backup/`
gitignore entry is removed from newly-generated `.gitignore` files.

## processkit compatibility matrix

New `cli/src/compat.rs` embeds an explicit aibox↔processkit version table.
`aibox sync` now warns when the configured `[processkit].version` is below the
minimum for the running aibox binary:

```
Warning: processkit v0.6.0 is below the minimum recommended version v0.8.0 for aibox v0.17.6 ...
```

This is a warning only — the installer continues to handle both v0.7.0 and v0.8.0 layouts.

New reference page: `docs/reference/compatibility.md`.

## `[aibox] version` — now a target pin

The `version` field in `aibox.toml [aibox]` is repurposed: it is now the
**desired/target** aibox version for this project, not a "don't touch" tracking
field (that role belongs to `aibox.lock [aibox].cli_version`).

`aibox sync` emits a warning if the running CLI version differs from the pinned
target, nudging the owner to update the pin after intentional upgrades.

## Docs improvements

- All 6 Zellij layouts documented with SVG panel diagrams
- All 7 color themes documented with asciinema embed wiring
- All 7 Starship prompt presets documented with ASCII previews
- asciinema player correctly wired into Docusaurus (scripts/stylesheets config)
- Cast paths corrected across all pages (`/aibox/screencasts/...`)
